title: Heavy traffic in Colombo due to protest march
body_lines: Severe traffic congestion has been reported from Town Hall towards Slave Island due to a protest march by university students.
Organised by the Inter University Students’ Federation (IUSF), the protest march is heading towards Slave Island.
They are protesting against the government of President Gotabaya Rajapaksa and Prime Minister Ranil Wickremesinghe.
